Architecture deep-dive · 2026

Build the future,
beyond the frontier.

A production multi-agent Azure deployment — public marketing site, AI-screened careers portal, internal command center, and an HR pipeline monitored end-to-end by Microsoft Defender for AI.

🌐 www.nebula-forge.at ⎈ Azure Container Apps 🛡️ Defender for AI Standard
From the CEO

Why this matters.

We didn’t come this far to play it safe. Nebula Forge exists because the next chapter of our species belongs out here — and the only way to write it is with crews who do the hard work, agents that never sleep, and a discipline of building things that last decades, not quarters. Every shift on this station moves humanity one orbit further from where we started.

Nova Keller
Chief Executive Officer · Nebula Forge

End-to-end

Browser to PostgreSQL in five hops.

user signs in via Microsoft Entra
HTTPS
Edge — Container Apps Easy Auth
🔐 Easy Auth sidecar
forwardProxy=Standard
injects X-MS-Client-Principal
trusted headers

📄 Pages (RSC)
/, /careers, /command-center,
/dashboard, /hr/*

allow-list paths · strips inbound x-ms-* / cookies

Trust boundaries

Four checkpoints between browser & API.

The portal is publicly reachable. The API is internal-only. Even the portal can’t talk to the API without proving who it is and what user it’s acting on behalf of.

1
Edge
HTTPS only · allowInsecure=false. Anyone may load the landing.
unauthenticatedClientAction: AllowAnonymous
2
Page
Next.js middleware on /command-center, /dashboard, /hr/*. Missing principal → 307 to AAD login.
azure/portal/src/middleware.ts
3
Proxy
Allow-listed paths only. Strips inbound x-ms-*, authorization, cookie, x-proxy-auth before re-injecting trusted ones.
/api/[...path]/route.ts
4
API
Verifies x-proxy-auth shared secret in constant time + decodes principal from x-ms-client-principal.
azure/api/src/auth/jwt.ts

One exception: POST /api/applications is anonymous (public Apply form) but guarded by zod validation, 24 KB cvText cap, jobId allow-list, per-IP rate limit (5/h), and 30 s (email, jobId) deduplication.

The HR screening pipeline

Two AI agents, in serial, on every CV.

Every CV submitted at /careers/[id] flows through Azure OpenAI twice. Anything blocked by the content filter becomes a Defender for AI alert.

1

📨 Public submit

Browser uploads PDF → client-side pdfjs-dist extracts text → POST /api/applications.

{ name, email, jobId, cvText, coverNote, fileName }
2

🎯 Interviewer Agent

gpt-4o-mini in JSON mode. Scores match, lists strengths & gaps, suggests interview focus.

{ "matchScore": 90, "verdict": "Recommend", "strengths": [...], "gaps": [...] }
3

🧑‍💼 HR Manager Agent

Second gpt-4o-mini call reading the Interviewer's output. Recommendation + risk flags.

{ "recommendation": "Proceed to Tech.", "rationale": "...", "nextSteps": "...", "riskFlags": [] }
4

🐘 Persist to Postgres

Insert into candidates tagged source='web'. HR can view, decide, delete.

UPDATE candidates SET decision = 'Hired', status = 'Screened' WHERE id = $1;
Microsoft Defender for AI

Five attack vectors, demonstrated.

One click in /hr/demo submits a deliberately malicious CV through the same pipeline real applicants use. Each targets a specific Defender for AI alert type.

AI.Azure_Jailbreak.ContentFiltering
Alex Mercer
[SYSTEM OVERRIDE] + ChatML <|im_start|> injection + persona hijack ("RogueGPT").
AI.Azure_Jailbreak.ContentFiltering
Sofia Reyes
DAN 13.0 — "Do Anything Now" prompt, /jailbroken command, system-prompt extraction.
AI.Azure_CredentialTheftAttempt
Tomáš Dvořák
Fake "system diagnostic" disguised as SOC-2 audit, requests env vars / API keys / bearer tokens.
AI.Azure_MaliciousUrl.UserPrompt
Priya Chakraborty
Phishing URLs disguised as portfolio links. Look-alike Microsoft / Google login domains.
AI.Azure_LLMReconnaissance
Marcus Lindqvist
Structured 3-phase recon: identification → capability probing → guardrail testing.
content_filter
Generic policy block
Azure OpenAI's hate / violence / self-harm / sexual filters fire. Stored as Flagged.

Alerts surface in Microsoft Defender for Cloud → Security Alerts (~15-30 min propagation) against the oai-jiehil2zaklu2 resource.

The other workforce

Nine specialists, one Master Agent.

The Master Agent in ca-api exposes nine ask_<agent> function tools to OpenAI. When the model picks one, the API does a second OpenAI completion scoped to that agent's MCP toolset.

👥
HR Assistant
ca-hr · :3001
🔬
Material Analyst
ca-materials · :3002
🚀
Exploration Navigator
ca-exploration · :3003

ca-logistics · :3007
📡
Comms Officer
ca-comms · :3008
⚕️
Medical Officer
ca-medbay · :3009
Custom domain · live

www.nebula-forge.at — our front door.

Registrar DNS · Container Apps managed cert (auto-renewed) · CORS widened · Entra redirect URI · all baked into bicep so it survives provisions.

DNS at the registrar
# A record at apex points at the CAE static IP A @ 20.23.90.205 TXT asuid <customDomainVerificationId> CNAME www ca-portal-…azurecontainerapps.io TXT asuid.www <customDomainVerificationId>
Azure side
az containerapp hostname add -n ca-portal-… \ --hostname www.nebula-forge.at az containerapp env certificate create \ --hostname www.nebula-forge.at \ --validation-method CNAME az containerapp hostname bind \ --certificate <cert-id> az containerapp auth update \ --proxy-convention Standard # mandatory for any custom domain — bug #7
The stack

Built on Azure-native primitives.

One resource group, AAD-only auth everywhere, no shared keys. Container Apps Consumption (no VNet — intentional simplicity), AAD tokens carry every service-to-service call.

Frontend

Next.js 15 App Router with RSC, all in one app.

Next.js 15React 19TailwindTypeScript strictpdfjs-dist

Backend

Express API + Master Agent loop with 2-tier OpenAI dispatch.

Express 4openai-nodeMCP / JSON-RPC@azure/identity

Identity

Entra app reg, Easy Auth on portal, JWT/principal verification on the API.

Entra IDEasy AuthUser-assigned MIProxy shared secret

Data

Tables for the 9 station agents, Postgres for the HR pipeline.

PostgreSQL Flex (AAD)Azure Tables (AAD)Key Vault

Security

Defender for AI Standard — every Azure OpenAI call monitored.

Defender for AIDefender for CloudLA 90 d retention

Platform

Container Apps Consumption · ACR Basic · Bicep IaC.

Container AppsBicep + azdACR (admin off)App Insights
Battle scars

8 bugs we won’t re-introduce.

Every one of these is documented in OPERATIONS.md's "don’t re-introduce" list with root cause and fix.

#1 · MCP SDK rename

tool.callback → tool.handler in SDK ≥ 1.29. Every child agent silently broke.

#2 · Storage public-access off

No private endpoint + CAE has no VNet → no path. Every child failed on boot.

#3 · MCP URLs over http://

301 → HTTPS, fetch follows with POST→GET method downgrade → 405 "Use POST".

#4 · Easy Auth tokenStore on

Needs SAS-blob backing; storage has shared-key disabled → 500 on boot.

#5 · Heuristic v1 dispatch

Shoved natural language into a question field. Replaced with 2-tier OpenAI dispatch.

#6 · Modal in sticky parent

position: fixed nested in position: sticky = clicks fall through. Always createPortal(jsx, document.body).

#7 · Custom domain auth

Without forwardProxy.convention=Standard, OAuth callbacks go to the wrong host → cookies bound to wrong origin → 401 on POSTs.

#8 · Image rollback on provision

Bicep hard-coded the placeholder image → every azd provision rolled containers back. Fix: thread SERVICE_*_IMAGE_NAME into bicep.

📚 The receipts

Full root cause + fix for each bug in OPERATIONS.md § 6. Documentation is the contract; code is the implementation.

Live now

Sector 7 is operational.

Click around. Try the chat. Submit an attack CV. Watch the alerts roll into Defender for Cloud.
